name: Describe a person
description: talk about a person you know
author: IELTS Practice Team

questions.text: Describe a person you know who is kind.

card.title: Describe a person you know who is kind.
card.subtitle: You should say:
bullets: explain why you think he or she is so kind

questions.text: Describe a member of your family you get on well with.

card.title: Describe a member of your family you get on well with.
card.subtitle: You should say:
bullets: who it is and what relationship you have with this person
explain why you get on so well
